mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, type, icon, name, description, sort, created_at, updated_at FROM categories WHERE user_id = #{userId} OR user_id IS NULL ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT id, user_id, type, icon, name, description, sort, created_at, updated_at FROM categories WHERE type = #{type} AND (user_id = #{userId} OR user_id IS NULL) ORDER BY sort ASC
